home.shape_desc: We collaborate to choose the form that best reflects your character and hand structure.

procedure.step4_desc: Completed with protective layer and aesthetic touch.

care.label: MAINTENANCE PROTOCOL
care.title: Care Guide
care.description: Professional guide for the long-term health and aesthetics of your nails after laboratory procedures.
care.seo_keywords: nail care, aftercare, gel maintenance, acrylic care, manicure tips

items.label: First 24 hours
items.desc: Avoid very hot water and steam (sauna, hammam).

items.label: Pressure
items.desc: Do not use nails as tools to open boxes or scrape.

items.label: Shortening
items.desc: Do not cut or file extensions at home.

items.label: Moisture
items.desc: Keep cuticles supple with cuticle oil.

items.label: Sunscreen
items.desc: Some colours can fade in the sun; use protection.

items.label: Stains
items.desc: Mind contact with spices or hair dye.

items.label: Removal
items.desc: Never peel off gel polish yourself; it damages the plate.

items.label: Breaks
items.desc: Ask your specialist about resting periods when needed.

care.warning_body: If you feel lifting, air pockets, or pain after an impact, contact us without delay.
